Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="LG_PlasSMG" or defName="LG_PlasRifle" or defName="LG_PlasRifleBay" or defName="LG_PlasRifleGrenadier" or defName="LG_PlasRifleMedic" or defName="LG_PlasSniperRifle" or defName="LG_HeavyPlasmaMGA" or defName="LG_HeavyPlasmaMGB") and not(verbs/li/soundAiming)]/verbs/li
